scenes.title: The Crossroads
scenes.body: Rain taps against your cloak as you reach the signpost to Briar Glen. A distant bell tolls from the village chapel.

choices.label: Head straight to the chapel bell
Investigate lantern lights in the woods

scenes.title: Chapel of St. Varr
scenes.body: Inside, a weary priest asks for help: children have gone missing near the old mill.

choices.label: Take the priest's blessing and march to the mill
Question the priest about recent omens

scenes.title: Lanterns Between the Trees
scenes.body: You find three hanging lanterns with no owners nearby, each swaying against a wind you cannot feel.

choices.label: Follow the trail toward the mill

scenes.title: Whispered Omens
scenes.body: Symbols scratched into stone match tales of a hungry fey spirit. The spirit is bound somewhere beneath the mill.

choices.label: Confront the spirit beneath the mill

scenes.title: The Old Mill
scenes.body: Beneath the rotting floorboards, you break the binding circle and face the trapped spirit. Briar Glen will remember what you choose next.
